originalTitle: Trading firm DRW suffered sharp loss on power market as prices gyrated
summary: Group took $176mn hit and parted ways with its head electricity and gas trader as winter volatility battered positions
content: Group took $176mn hit and parted ways with its head electricity and gas trader as winter volatility battered positions
chineseTitle: 由于价格波动，贸易公司 DRW 在电力市场遭受大幅损失
chineseSummary: 由于冬季波动重创了头寸，该集团遭受了 1.76 亿美元的损失，并与其首席电力和天然气交易商分道扬镳
chineseContent: 由于冬季波动重创了头寸，该集团遭受了 1.76 亿美元的损失，并与其首席电力和天然气交易商分道扬镳
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
